resource.manifest:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{=toJSON(inputs.parameters.name)}}
data:
  client.properties: |-
    ssl.truststore.type=PEM
    ssl.truststore.location=/config/kafka-ca/ca.crt

parameters.name: jsonConfig
parameters.value: {{=toJSON(sprig.merge(sprig.merge(sprig.merge(sprig.dict("targetUri", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['endpoint'], "insecure", sprig.dig('allowInsecure', false, fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig))), (('authConfig' in fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)) ? ((('sigv4' in fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['authConfig']) ? (sprig.dict("sigv4AuthHeaderServiceRegion", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['authConfig']['sigv4']['service']+','+fromJSON(inputs.parameters.targetConfig)['authConfig']['sigv4']['region'])) : (sprig.dict()))) : (sprig.dict()))), sprig.omit(fromJSON(inputs.parameters.replayerOptions), 'jvmArgs', 'loggingConfigurationOverrideConfigMap', 'podReplicas', 'minPodReplicas', 'useLocalStack', 'resources', 'fileSourceVolumes', 'fileSourceVolumeMounts')), sprig.merge(sprig.dict("kafkaTrafficBrokers", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaConnection == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaConnection) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['kafkaConnection'])), "kafkaTrafficTopic", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['kafkaTopic'], "kafkaTrafficGroupId", inputs.parameters.kafkaGroupId, "kafkaTrafficListenerName", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaListenerName == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaListenerName) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['listenerName'])), "kafkaTrafficAuthType", ((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['authType'])), "kafkaTrafficSecretName", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['secretName'], "kafkaTrafficUserName", fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['kafkaUserName']), ((((!(inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType == '')) ? (inputs.parameters.resolvedKafkaAuthType) : (fromJSON(inputs.parameters.kafkaConfig)['authType'])) == 'scram-sha-512') ? (sprig.dict("kafkaTrafficPropertyFile", '/config/kafka-auth/client.properties')) : (sprig.dict())))))}}
